---
title: "About"
description: "About Qingyang Liu and contact information."
---

I am interested in theoretical studies of hadron structure and interactions, with an emphasis on lattice QCD, charmonium and charmoniumlike states, and relativistic potential models.

## Profile

::: {.profile-panel}
**Name**  
Qingyang Liu

**Field**  
Theoretical Physics

**Institution**  
<span class="todo-marker">TODO</span> Add current institutional affiliation.

**Position**  
<span class="todo-marker">TODO</span> Add current position or title.

**Email**  
<span class="todo-marker">TODO</span> Add a public academic email address.

**ORCID**  
<span class="todo-marker">TODO</span> Add a verified ORCID identifier.
:::

## Research interests

- Lattice QCD
- Hadron spectroscopy
- Charmonium and charmoniumlike states
- Hadron–hadron interactions
- Relativistic potential models

## Online

[GitHub profile](https://github.com/lqy-lattice){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
